name: e2e
description: Standalone Node.js/Playwright scripts that validate the reservation system end-to-end against a running dev server. They are **not** picked up by Vitest (which only scans `__tests__/**`).

scripts.check: node --check env.mjs && node --check qa-no-show-expiry.mjs && node --check qa-reservation-cancellation.mjs && node --check qa-reservation-equipment.mjs && node --check qa-reservation-lifecycle.mjs
